1.content: What is your biologically given gender?
1.title: Start

choices: I'm not a man-hater...so I took it slow
I was overcome with the potential-I went much further and faster...
11.content:
I did love my husband Joe, but at key points he always seemed to show a weak side and I was tired of the milquetoast routine. I still wanted a real man in my life and there's been a few that have always paid attention to me.

With events as they are, I took a chance when Joe asked me about my expectations vis-a-vis the New World Order regulations that have been enacted. I told him the truth-I loved him and wanted to keep him in my life but things clearly would have to change. I suggested he take an internship in several service orientated industries. Specifically-catering, housekeeping, secretarial school and lastly cosmetology. This would make him more useful to me, our daughters (ages 20 & 18), and women in general. I envisioned the day he could quit his day job, which paid okay, but not great, so he could both earn money for me while serving the established superior gender.

I was pleasantly surprised when he readily agreed. I saw things falling into place. The internships took about 18 months, during which I became more demanding and selfish in our personal life. Our sex life wasn't good at all-typical male shit. His size was medium-so that was tolerable but not ideal-I like it a little larger. But he came too quick and his finger skills were lacking...his tongue on the other hand, for some reason, he knew what to do. He could read my responses, take his time and move when the time right. I love his breathing, kissing and sucking skills. AND he ate his own cream-pie...he did want to please me. I saw potential for our small family to benefit from utilizing NWO recommendations.
11.title: Female

choices: The girls take to the new order
I realize I may be pushing too fast...
111.content:
Joe worked as an intern for several woman-owned businesses. First was Catering Jo-Anne. Joe learned about food preparation, serving and cleaning up on a large scale. My thoughts here was if he could learn how do deal with seating configurations of 10-300, he'd easily be able to hand our family household.

Next was the maid service. He was treated like a typical worker from past times. He had to dress in a androgynous uniforms and clean different rooms, top-to-bottom in a minimum time allotment. My friend Kathy was the owner and particularly opinionated on what she thought was right and wrong-Joe's butt was red and raw on more than one occasion when he came home from cleaning hotel rooms and/or peoples homes.

These skills were the foundation of my future plans for me husband. I was going to tell my daughters that Joe, per the NWO agenda, would serve as a household servant and it would help his transition if they changed the way they look at him, refer to him and expectations of service from someone who's responsibility is to serve, not be a parent figure. I decided it was time to take a vacation with the girls and leave Joe behind to care for the house. I set up for him to start taking courses in cosmetology while we were gone. I actually went much further. I told an old flame, clearly still an alpha-male that we'd be on vaca for a few weeks and where we were. This allowed the girls to meet my old flame, Mark, in a neutral site without my husband being around so I could both enjoy his company and they could see their mother enjoying the company of a manly man and start rearranging their own assessment of the person who is their biological father.
111.title: Continue

choices: The girls take Joe to task
You explain to Mark the household situation
1111.content:
Both girls are on an upward career path. The oldest, Rebecca is a paralegal working on her law degree. Interesting, she's majoring in Public Affairs, which will include male management. Amy, the youngest is working on an engineering degree at local university. Rebecca has a wardrobe you'd expect of someone in the legal profession-tight skirts and blouses with jackets or pant suits. She almost always had her hair up and work heels of medium height at all times, going for higher heels socially. Amy on the other hand enjoyed a more relaxed appearance, she liked working out had had a very much "no nonsense" approach to life.

I can't say if they cared much for Mark over Joe, but with Joe going down the road to being the submissive in a FLR family, they completely embraced the idea of Joe doing all the housework, chores and all the little things to free up their time for whatever their passions were-be it work, study or play. I kinda felt bad for Joe knowing his life would soon be reduces to family maid, not just to me and my girls, but to my man as well.
1111.title: The girls take to the new order

choices: The wife and owner takes her place as head of household
11111.content: Rebecca was the first to step up. She first asked me if there were any limits I would place on hers and her sisters control. I did give this some thought. My first thoughts were that I had married this man, but in consideration of the NWO and the place males will be taking, I decided it was be unwise and unfair to everyone, including Joe if we shielded our FLR family from the outside world. He would be confused and it was far too likely he and we would get in trouble with the authorities, of course, most of the trouble would be directed to Joe, not his female owners. Owner is the new feeling I had...it seemed so powerful and liberating. With all this in mind, I told Rebecca and Amy there were no limitations, they could take full advantage to make their lives easier and fun-my only caution was to remember that we'd like to keep Joe so we should consider long term effects upon his body and mind as they go forward with our collective co-ownership. I would regain full title, but they were assigned co-owners when we registered during the annual survey.
11111.title: The girls take Joe to task

choices: Rebecca goes shopping and has "Joe" accompany
Rebecca provides more responsibilities to the maid
111111.content:
Rebecca was the first engage Joe after the NWO became official law of the land. "I don't think you should go by your previous name, now that you no longer have legal status in the eye of the state." she began. "I am going to call you 'maid' being as that is really what you are" she continued. She went further to say that as owned property: "you may no longer speak my name, that is irrelevant to you. You are a maid to everyone in this house, I will call you that in private or in public; likewise, you may refer to me by 'Miss', 'Ma'am', or something similar". "You will hand wash my dedicates, all of them and you will iron my blouses, skirts and pants when you finish washing them and prior to my wearing them". Just when I thought she was finished, she wasn't: "you will clean my footwear after every wearing-you don't have to use polish if you think they don't need it, but if I am dissatisfied-I will make that very clear to you." There will be other duties but we can cover that later.

Amy was much shorter in her talk: "Ditto for me" and then she slapped Joe hard across the face. "That is how you will know I am disappointed. Would you like another demonstration?" "No Ma'am" came the reply.
111111.title: Rebecca

choices: The team decided to play a different game next month...
Joe had to be hospitalized because....
111112.content: Amy's soccer team is having a paint-ball play date and Joe will the prey. Each girl has a different color and it's timed..everybody has to shoot him as least once. He'll have to wear lingerie when turned loose in the woods. The winner gets to use Joe for one full day for each time the winner shot him. What should happen next...
111112.title: Amy

111113.content:
Being the owner of a male servant, granted my former husband, came with responsibilities. I had to oversee the internships I made him sign up for. Each one only lasted 1-2 months, except for cosmetology which and a 12 month and 18 month program. I wanted him to be a nail technician and beautician for make-up and hair, so I signed him up for the long program. My girls would be able to help speed up his learning. I noticed how I started to refer to our daughters as "my girls", no longer including Joe in my relationship with my girls. Just as with the outside world in general, my dealings outside the house as well as my daughters outside activities were no longer a concern to our helper. His role was being reduced to household servant, looking after our things for us and doing what we ordered for us personally.

The new government laws categorized males into one of three groups. Non-sponsored, Sponsored, and Alpha Males. Joe was no Alpha. I decided to register him as being sponsored as a household servant to myself with my daughters as co-owners. Non-sponsored males were subject to immediate arrest if in public without a responsible female present. Being sponsored meant that Joe could be in public without us being present so long as he had his identification papers. This will make his shopping for us, going to his internships and training sessions easier on us. When I have an opportunity, I will take him in for an ID chip to be embedded in his neck, along with a bar-code tattoo to provide all contact, if found and other relevant information. Until then, he'll have to carry around his documentation, which is why I have conveniently provided him with an old purse to carry his valuables. Although I still love him, I get a playfully delightful feeling doing little things to humiliate him-I see him exploring his feminine side in the days and years to come. I also see me enjoying the company of some Alpha Males from time to time. I'd doubt I'd ever marry again-I just don't see men as being useful that way...but sex, that's something I'd like to rekindle as that flame has burnt out long-ago.

The girls were already thinking of other modification we could make to Joe, one of which was a new name that didn't remind them he used to be their dad. We agreed we should think of an appropriate "pet" type of name to get us thinking of him as an "it", something that exists only to serve it's masters.
111113.title: The wife and owner takes her place as head of h...

choices: They see your concerns and allay you fears...
Your daughters take the NWO initiative
12.content: At first you supported the new agenda. It was time for a change, but as things evolved and you saw men's rights eroded to a less than equal status, you now had strong reservations, but still, you love your family but fear for the future. You saw your daughters (20yo and 18yo) becoming more confident and assertive and your wife becoming increasingly distant. What comes with the next sunrise brings fear and dread.
12.title: Male

choices: an old Halloween Costume of Rose, French maid
123.content:
The next morning you are woken up by your daughters as they rush into your new room. For after the laws had changed your wife had decided if she was not in the mood you would sleep in the old guest room.

Due to the growing distance between you meant that you had been sleeping there almost every night now. Your daughters did not even bother to knock as they entered the room calling out "Good Morning Daddy," waking you up with a start. "Something very funny has happened Daddy," Rose your youngest said looking as if she was holding back a bout of giggles.

"Well funny for us, not for you," your eldest Daphne said holding something behind her back.

"What has happened?" you asked causing them to share a look before Rose loses her battle as a burst of laughter comes from her mouth.

"Well it seems the new law has a new component to it Daddy," Daphne said with a smirk seeming to hover around her mouth. "This morning it was passed that males dressing "Masculine" was now illegal so until Mommy take you shopping for some legal clothing you are going to have to wear some of our stuff."

"Even male underwear is illegal now," Rose said gasping for breath nearly double over from her laughter.

And to your horror Daphne brings out her hand showing you the outfit that they had picked of for you to wear for the day as you go shopping for your new clothing. It was....
123.title: Your daughters take the NWO initiative

info.description: Politics and Economics team up to overthrow the white male privilege that has eroded human advancement. Women are now in power and males no longer can vote, hold public office, nor own a bank account. Once married, male have a much more difficult road to divorce than females, who may divorce by a simple paperwork filing with the local court. Use this story to describe how you’d like to see it the interaction of male and female progress. No limitations on your imagination.
